items.description: Vehicle fire on I-76 westbound between Exit 342: US 13/US 30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO and .2 miles west of Exit 342: US 13/US 30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO. There is a lane restriction.
